## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential acquisition of Growthlist by GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai seeks to acquire media properties for experimentation and showcasing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Growthlist generates \~$60k annual revenue with 4,500-5,000 subscribers (80%+ free tier)](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Potential acquisition offer around 2x projected annual revenue (\~$120k)](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai values domain age, backlink profile, and existing traffic/subscriber base](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

## Topics

### Growthlist Background

  - [Purchased by CJ around Thanksgiving from broker site (Empire Flippers)](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [WordPress-based site with curated startup funding data](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Offers tiered subscriptions and custom lead lists](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [\~4,500-5,000 subscribers (80%+ free tier)](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [40-50 intro monthly tier, 50 regular paid, 15 premium plan subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [$3-4k average monthly revenue, fluctuates with annual subscriptions and custom orders](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Acquisition Interest

  - [Seeking media properties for experimentation and risk-taking](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Led by Marcel Santilli, ex-CMO of various startups](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Team includes former TechCrunch editor-in-chief, TripAdvisor SEO head](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Publishes 20M+ words monthly for clients with 50-person editorial team](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Values existing subscriber base and not starting from zero](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

### Potential Acquisition Terms

  - [GrowthX.ai proposed \~2x projected annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [CJ bought at 37x monthly profit (2x annual revenue) in November](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Current annual revenue: $62,270 (rolling 12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Adjusted annual revenue: $60,059 (excluding one-off partnership)](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Organic traffic: \~1,600 visitors/month (30-day rolling average via Ahrefs)](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)

### Next Steps for Potential Deal

  - [CJ to provide detailed offer and site metrics (including Google Search Console data)](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Marcel to present to GrowthX.ai team for expedited decision](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Potential 1-month transition support from CJ if deal proceeds](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

## Next Steps

  - [CJ to compile and send detailed offer, including:](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
      - [Proposed sale price based on \~2x annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
      - [Accurate traffic data from Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [Overview of current operations and team](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Marcel to review offer with GrowthX.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Follow-up discussion once GrowthX.ai team has evaluated the proposal](https://fathom.video/share/s69BupHJY-Tne52kD3Lb51V5gz3Wd27S?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
